KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_UNIVERSAL_INTUITIVE_DESC: Basic survival knowledge that is nearly impossible to lose. Anyone can learn by observation.
KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_COMMON_PRACTICE_DESC: Widely practiced community skills. Requires a minimum number of active practitioners.
KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_CRAFT_TACIT_DESC: Specialized skills passed through master-apprentice chains. Vulnerable if the chain breaks.
KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_ELITE_SCHOLARLY_DESC: Expert knowledge requiring formal education and institutional support.
KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_INSTITUTIONAL_STATE_DESC: Knowledge embedded in organizations and roles. Collapses when institutions fail.
KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_INFRASTRUCTURE_NETWORKED_: Knowledge dependent on physical infrastructure and trade networks.
TECH_LOST_FMT: The knowledge of {tech} has been lost...
TECH_REGRESSION_WARNING_FMT: Knowledge of {tech} is fading — only {count} practitioners remain.
